text: Paper presents the formal and technical conditions for applying calcareous fly ash as an active pozzolanic–hydraulic cement and binder component. It has been illustrated using the examples of hydraulic road binders and masonry cements with calcareous fly ash obtained from the Bełchatów power plant. The research results obtained from the mixtures series were presented: fly ash mortars containing different amounts of calcareous fly ash and the mixes made with a mixture of fly ashes such as siliceous fly ash and the fly ash from fluidized bed combustion. The required by standards, normative properties of hydraulic road binders and masonry cements were checked. It was shown that the calcareous fly ash from the Bełchatów power plant is a very valuable component which enables the preparation of high quality hydraulic binders and cements satisfying current requirements and certificates.
